version_description: Chaka Khan - I Feel For You - Capo 2 - Link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ecAg_34Rtws.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 2

Note:  If you wante to play a chord in the introduction, C/A or Am7 works nicely through it.

[Intro]
N.C.
Chaka, Chaka, Chaka, Chaka Khan
N.C.
Chaka Khan, Chaka Khan, Chaka Khan
N.C.
Chaka Khan, let me rock you
N.C.
Let me rock you, Chaka Khan
N.C.
Let me rock you, that's all I wanna do
N.C.
Chaka Khan, let me rock you
N.C.
Let me rock you, Chaka Khan
N.C.
Let me rock you, let me feel for you
N.C.
Chaka Khan let me tell you what I wanna do
N.C.
Do you feel for me, the way I feel for you
N.C.
Chaka Khan let me tell you what I wanna do
N.C.
I wanna love you, wanna hug you, wanna squeeze you too
N.C.
Let me take you in my arms
N.C.
Let me fill you with my charms, Chaka
N.C.
Cause you know that I'm the one to keep you warm
N.C.
Chaka, I'll make you more than just a physical dream
N.C.
I wanna rock you, Chaka
N.C.
Baby, cause you make me wanna scream

[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
    Let me rock you, rock you[/tab]

[ch]Dmaj7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  Baby, baby, when I look at you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
  I get a warm feeling inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  There's something about the things you do[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
  That keeps me satisfied[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
  I wouldn't lie to you, baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
  It's mainly a physical thing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
  This feeling that i got for you, baby[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Makes me wanna sing[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
  I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I think I love you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
  I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I think I love you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Chaka Khan, let me rock you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me rock you, Chaka Khan[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me rock you, that's all I wanna do[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
  Chaka Khan, let me rock you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Let me rock you, Chaka Khan[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Let me rock you, let me feel for you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
  Feel for you[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  Baby, baby, when I lay with you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
  There's no place I'd rather be[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  I can't believe, can't believe it's true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
  The things that you do to me[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
  I wouldn't lie to you, baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm physically attracted to you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
  This feeling that I got for you, baby[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
  There's nothing that I wouldn't do[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
  I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I think I love you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
  I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I think I love you[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]

[ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[tab][ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
.....[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  Yes sir, one more time[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  Say yeah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I feel for you (I think I love you)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd9[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  I feel for you (I, I, I think I love you)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Chaka Khan, let me rock you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me rock you, Chaka Khan[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me rock you, that's all I wanna do[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
  Chaka Khan, let me rock you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Let me rock you, Chaka Khan[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Let me rock you, let me feel for you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Chaka Khan won't you tell me what you wanna do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Do you feel for me, the way I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
  Chaka Khan let me tell you what I wanna do[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I wanna love you, wanna hug you, wanna squeeze you too[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me take you in my arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Let me fill you with my charms, Chaka[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Cause you know that I'm the one to keep you warm[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
  Chaka, I'll make you more than just a physical dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I wanna rock you, Chaka[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Baby, cause you make me wanna scream[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  Feel for you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  I feel for you (Oooh, feel for you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  I feel it too (Oooh, feel for you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  I feel for you (Oooh, feel for you)[/tab]
